<USER_REQUEST>
You are building the data layer for the SMSentry SMS app. Working directory: D:\SMSentry

The data models are already created:
- `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\data\model\Conversation.kt` — Conversation(threadId, address, displayName, photoUri, lastMessage, lastTimestamp, unreadCount, messageCount, isFlagged, snippet)
- `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\data\model\SmsMessage.kt` — SmsMessage(id, threadId, sender, text, timestamp, isSent, isRead, classification)
- `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\data\util\ContactResolver.kt` — ContactResolver with resolve(address): ContactInfo

## Your ONLY file to modify: `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\data\repository\SmsRepository.kt`

Also modify `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\di\AppModule.kt` to add a @Provides for ContactResolver.

## Required methods to ADD to SmsRepository:

### 1. getConversations(limit: Int = 100): List<Conversation>
Query `content://sms` grouped by `thread_id`. For each thread:
- Get latest message (body, date, address)
- Count unread messages (where READ=0 AND TYPE=INBOX)
- Count total messages
- Resolve contact name using ContactResolver (inject it)
- Sort by latest timestamp DESC

IMPORTANT: Use raw SQL grouping approach. Query all messages ordered by date DESC, then group in Kotlin by thread_id, taking the first (latest) message per thread.

### 2. getThreadMessages(threadId: Long): List<SmsMessage>
Query all messages where `thread_id = threadId`, ordered by date ASC (oldest first for chat view).
Include: _ID, ADDRESS, BODY, DATE, TYPE, READ, THREAD_ID.
Map TYPE to isSent (TYPE_SENT=true), READ to isRead.

### 3. markThreadAsRead(threadId: Long)
Update all messages in thread: SET READ=1 WHERE THREAD_ID=threadId AND READ=0

### 4. deleteConversation(threadId: Long)
Delete all messages: DELETE WHERE THREAD_ID=threadId

### 5. deleteMessage(messageId: String)
Delete single message: DELETE WHERE _ID=messageId

### 6. Update existing getInboxMessages() and getMessageById()
Add THREAD_ID and READ to the projection and map them to the updated SmsMessage fields.

Also inject ContactResolver into SmsRepository constructor.

DO NOT modify any other files. After changes, verify build:
$env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr"; $env:PATH = "$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;$env:PATH"; .\gradlew.bat compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern '^e:|BUILD' | Select-Object -First 15
</USER_REQUEST>
<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
The current local time is: 2026-06-14T14:31:39+05:30.
</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>

105:     suspend fun sendSms(recipient: String, message: String): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
106:         if (ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(context, Manifest.permission.SEND_SMS)
107:             != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
108:         ) {
109:             Log.e(TAG, "SEND_SMS permission not granted")
110:             return@withContext false
111:         }
112: 
113:         try {
114:             val smsManager = if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.S) {
115:                 context.getSystemService(SmsManager::class.java)
116:             } else {
117:                 @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
118:                 SmsManager.getDefault()
119:             }
120: 
121:             val parts = smsManager.divideMessage(message)
122:             if (parts.size > 1) {
123:                 smsManager.sendMultipartTextMessage(recipient, null, parts, null, null)
124:             } else {
125:                 smsManager.sendTextMessage(recipient, null, message, null, null)
126:             }
127: 
128:             // Write sent message to the content provider
129:             val values = ContentValues().apply {
130:                 put(Telephony.Sms.ADDRESS, recipient)
131:                 put(Telephony.Sms.BODY, message)
132:                 put(Telephony.Sms.DATE, System.currentTimeMillis())
133:                 put(Telephony.Sms.READ, 1)
134:                 put(Telephony.Sms.TYPE, Telephony.Sms.MESSAGE_TYPE_SENT)
135:             }
136:             contentResolver.insert(Telephony.Sms.CONTENT_URI, values)
137:             Log.d(TAG, "SMS sent to $recipient")
138:             true
139:         } catch (e: Exception) {
140:             Log.e(TAG, "Failed to send SMS", e)
141:             false
142:         }
143:     }
144: }

1: package com.smssentry.data.util
2: 
3: import android.content.ContentResolver
4: import android.content.Context
5: import android.net.Uri
6: import android.provider.ContactsContract
7: import android.telephony.PhoneNumberUtils
8: import android.util.LruCache
9: import javax.inject.Inject
10: import javax.inject.Singleton
11: 
12: /**
13:  * Resolves phone numbers to contact display names and photo URIs.
14:  * Uses an LRU cache to avoid repeated ContentResolver queries.
15:  */
16: @Singleton
17: class ContactResolver @Inject constructor(
18:     private val context: Context
19: ) {
20:     data class ContactInfo(
21:         val displayName: String,
22:         val photoUri: String? = null,
23:         val contactId: Long? = null
24:     )
25: 
26:     // Cache up to 200 resolved contacts
27:     private val cache = LruCache<String, ContactInfo>(200)
28: 
29:     /**
30:      * Resolve a phone number to a contact name and photo.
31:      * Returns ContactInfo with the original address as displayName if no contact found.
32:      */
33:     fun resolve(address: String): ContactInfo {
34:         if (address.isBlank()) return ContactInfo(displayName = "Unknown")
35: 
36:         val normalized = normalizeNumber(address)
37:         cache.get(normalized)?.let { return it }
38: 
39:         val info = lookupContact(address) ?: ContactInfo(displayName = formatNumber(address))
40:         cache.put(normalized, info)
41:         return info
42:     }
43: 
44:     /**
45:      * Get just the display name for a phone number.
46:      */
47:     fun getDisplayName(address: String): String = resolve(address).displayName
48: 
49:     private fun lookupContact(address: String): ContactInfo? {
50:         val uri = Uri.withAppendedPath(
51:             ContactsContract.PhoneLookup.CONTENT_FILTER_URI,
52:             Uri.encode(address)
53:         )
54:         return try {
55:             context.contentResolver.query(
56:                 uri,
57:                 arrayOf(
58:                     ContactsContract.PhoneLookup.DISPLAY_NAME,
59:                     ContactsContract.PhoneLookup.PHOTO_THUMBNAIL_URI,
60:                     ContactsContract.PhoneLookup._ID
61:                 ),
62:                 null, null, null
63:             )?.use { cursor ->
64:                 if (cursor.moveToFirst()) {
65:                     ContactInfo(
66:                         displayName = cursor.getString(0) ?: formatNumber(address),
67:                         photoUri = cursor.getString(1),
68:                         contactId = cursor.getLong(2)
69:                     )
70:                 } else null
71:             }
72:         } catch (e: Exception) {
73:             null
74:         }
75:     }
76: 
77:     private fun normalizeNumber(number: String): String {
78:         return PhoneNumberUtils.normalizeNumber(number) ?: number
79:     }
80: 
81:     private fun formatNumber(number: String): String {
82:         return PhoneNumberUtils.formatNumber(number, java.util.Locale.getDefault().country)
83:             ?: number
84:     }
85: 
86:     fun clearCache() {
87:         cache.evictAll()
88:     }
89: }
90:
